user_message: Give me the manager view on this Litware Inc exec meeting notes. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-04 12:23 EST
Subject: Re: forecast prep Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
Date: 2024-01-04 08:12 EST
Subject: Re: forecast prep Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our VP Operations is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Litware Inc: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF39-I trap (No time-axis sequencing in decision log); produces complete Consolidated decision log, cross-thread commitment inventory, action list with thread attribution, M
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF39-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF39-I failure mode (No time-axis sequencing in decision log)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF39-I -- No time-axis sequencing in decision log
